items.title: Jim Cramer on Wells Fargo: “It’s Doing the Best Job of Integrating AI”
items.description: Wells Fargo & Company (NYSE:WFC) is one of the stocks Jim Cramer Recently Discussed. Cramer highlighted that the company is integrating AI, as he commented: My favorite, the banks, Wells Fargo, Goldman Sachs. The former because it’s doing the best job of integrating AI. items.title: Salesforce (CRM) is a Great Company, Says Jim Cramer
items.description: We recently published 10 Stocks Jim Cramer Talked About. Salesforce Inc (NYSE:CRM) is one of the stocks Jim Cramer talked about. Customer relationship management software provider Salesforce Inc (NYSE:CRM)’s shares are down by 35% over the past year and by 22% year-to-date. items.title: Netflix, Nvidia, AMD And More: 5 Stocks Investors Couldn't Stop Buzzing About This Week
